data.title: Playback available for webinar on construction risk hosted by AM Best.Industry faces challenges including rising costs and labor shortages.
data.description: In Oldwick, N.J., a recent complimentary webinar titled “Navigating Construction Risk: Evolving Exposures, Strategic Solutions,” sponsored by Munich Re Specialty and hosted by AM Best, is now offering video playback. The construction industry encounters a challenging risk environment influenced by increasing costs, labor scarcities, complex projects, and changes in the legal landscape. The webinar features a panel of insurance professionals from broking and underwriting sectors discussing these industry challenges. Construction companies are urged to watch the video for insights on tackling these evolving risks.

A powerful mudflow surged from Russia’s Mount Elbrus, flooding Tyrnyauz, halting water and gas, and damaging homes, highways, and the town’s lifeline bridge. Locals and tourists evacuated as the region reels from this natural shock.

data.title: Darrin Anderson appointed CEO of KENDELL, a commercial door solutions provider in Minneapolis - 25 years of experience.
data.description: In a news release from Minneapolis on August 1, 2025, KENDELL, a prominent supplier of commercial door, frame, and hardware solutions, revealed the appointment of Darrin Anderson as their new Chief Executive Officer. With this development, Anderson, who boasts more than 25 years of leadership expertise, assumes the role with immediate effect.

data.title: Capitol City Brewing Company in Washington DC, shuts down after 33 years on August 28, 2025 - a landmark pub's closure.
data.description: After over 30 years of operation, Capitol City Brewing Company in Washington, D.C., will be shutting down on August 28, 2025. The establishment has been a significant part of the community, being the first brewpub to open in D.C. post-Prohibition. Known for its award-winning beers, traditional pub food, live sports screenings, and vibrant Downtown ambiance, Capitol City has been a popular spot since it first opened on August 23, 19XX.

data.title: PCS Edventures! buys back 3,736,170 shares, enhancing its position as a provider of STEM education programs.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, in Meridian, Idaho, PCS Edventures!, Inc. disclosed that they have bought back 3,736,170 of their shares from the market between July 7, 2025, and July 28, 2025. PCS Edventures is a prominent provider of STEM education programs for students in TK-12 grades.

data.title: Bitcoin marks 8th anniversary of Block Size Wars with significant value growth post-independence from miner control on Aug. 1, 2017.
data.description: Since August 1, 2017, the value of Bitcoin has significantly increased following the Bitcoin community's move to break free from miner control.

data.title: Canaan Inc. adopts Bitcoin (BTC) as primary reserve asset in new policy, focusing on growth and liquidity.
data.description: Canaan Inc. recently announced its new cryptocurrency holding policy, highlighting Bitcoin as the primary reserve asset to meet strategic growth and liquidity requirements. This move comes as part of the company's strategy to secure its financial position in the volatile crypto market. Canaan Inc. aims to maintain a substantial amount of Bitcoin in its reserves to support its long-term objectives. The decision signifies a shift towards a more Bitcoin-centric approach within the company. This policy update reflects Canaan Inc.'s commitment to adapting to the evolving crypto landscape by ensuring a significant portion of its assets – a noteworthy development in the industry.
